name: Cheest Tater Topper
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Pkg frozen mixed vegetables (cooked and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes thoroughly until done.
2. Prick each potato with a fork, then bake in a 425°F oven for 40-60 minutes, or until cooked through. Alternatively, prick the skin of the potatoes and place them in a microwave oven. Cook on high power for 14-17 minutes, or until cooked through, rearranging once.
3. In a small saucepan, stir together the milk, cornstarch, mustard, and pepper. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
4. Add cheese to the mixture and stir until melted.
5. Stir in the mixed vegetables and heat thoroughly.
6. Serve warm over baked potatoes.
